# pexip_infinity_media_library_playlist_entry (Resource)

Manages a media library playlist entry configuration with the Infinity service. Playlist entries define the media items and their playback order within a playlist.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_media_library_playlist_entry" "example" {
  playlist = pexip_infinity_media_library_playlist.example.id
  media    = pexip_infinity_media_library_entry.example.id
  position = 1
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `playlist` (String) Resource URI of the playlist this entry belongs to.

### Optional

- `entry_type` (String) Type of entry referred to by playlist entry. Valid choices: MEDIA. Default: MEDIA.
- `media` (String) Resource URI of the media library entry to include in the playlist.
- `playcount` (Number) The number of times the item is played, the default is 1. If you set the value to 0 the item plays repeatedly until the user disconnects themselves or until the call is terminated programmatically via the management API. Default: 1.
- `position` (Number) Every item must have a unique position specified. This refers to the order in which the Media Library Item is played relative to the other items in the playlist. Please note that Position is only used when shuffle is off. Default: 1.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the media library playlist entry in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the media library playlist entry in Infinity
